name: Sixth Sense
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>第</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>感</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Declare 2 numbers from 1 to 6, then your opponent rolls a six-sided die, and if the result is one of the numbers you declared, you draw that many cards. Otherwise, send a number of cards from the top of your Deck to the Graveyard equal to the result.
eff: Declare 2 numbers from 1 to 6, then your opponent rolls a six-sided die, and if the result is one of the numbers you declared, you draw that many cards. Otherwise, send a number of cards from the top of your Deck to the Graveyard equal to the result.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 4: Joey's World Mega Pack

action: Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
